landing.hero_title: Touch-type by motion, not by hunting keys.
landing.tagline: FlowTyping shows the path each finger travels — home to key and back. Accuracy and rhythm first; speed follows.
landing.demo_aria: Demonstration: a finger travels from its home key to the target and back; each finger has its own color.

principles.title: The path, not the key
principles.body: We show the route a finger takes to a key and back — you learn the motion, not a picture on the screen.

principles.title: Always home
principles.body: Every keystroke ends back on the ASDF–JKL; home row. Your hands always know where they are.

principles.title: Rhythm over rushing
principles.body: Even intervals between keystrokes. Accuracy leads — speed arrives on its own.

landing.philosophy_lead: Ordinary trainers highlight a key — and you watch the screen. FlowTyping draws the motion — and you feel the keyboard.
landing.philosophy_old_text: Highlights the key. Your eyes stay tied to the screen.
landing.philosophy_new_text: Shows the finger's path. Eyes free, memory in the hands.
landing.closing_text: A few minutes a day. Accuracy before speed.
landing.feedback_label: Found a problem? Get in touch

app.title: FlowTyping
app.error_body: Something went wrong. Try reloading the page.
app.error_network: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

settings.title: User Preferences
settings.display_name_description: Shown next to your avatar. Leave empty to use the name from your provider.
settings.finger_layout_description: Hand placement scheme (which finger presses each key).
settings.cursor_type_description: Shape of the cursor in the typing line.
settings.rhythm_channel_description: Show a rhythm guide under the typing line during training.
settings.delete_account_warning: This permanently deletes your account and all your data. This can't be undone.
settings.delete_account_error: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

stats_card.title: Session Results
stats_card.trend_aria: Accuracy over recent sessions, in percent: {values}

accuracy.how: The share of characters hit on the first keystroke. Only the first wrong keystroke counts as a miss: skip-ahead — typing on without noticing the typo — is subtracted, otherwise one mistake would count three times.
accuracy.means: hit it first time and the link «think of the symbol → the finger moves» is already wired. Miss it and the link hasn't formed yet — the finger is hunting for the key.

rhythm.how: How even the pauses between keystrokes are. Independent of pace: slow and even still scores high.
rhythm.means: an even rhythm means the movement has become automatic; spikes mean stumbles and hunting for keys. Rhythm sees what accuracy cannot: you can type everything correctly yet unevenly — which means some movements you still recall rather than execute.

volume.how: How many characters went through during active time — pauses don't count.
volume.means: how much the other numbers can be trusted. Over a short stretch they are random: a couple of lucky words lift accuracy, a couple of stumbles drop rhythm. The more characters, the less luck in them.

pace.how: The speed of the movement itself, without pauses for thinking: derived from the typical interval between keystrokes.
pace.means: the gap against volume is your thinking time. High pace with low volume means the movement is trained but recalling the symbol is not.

stats_sessions.title: Training sessions
stats_sessions.guest: Sign in to see your session history

stats_progression.title: Step progression
stats_progression.intro: The next step opens once the current step's symbols are ready ({debt} not yet ready allowed). A symbol is ready when it meets the three conditions below.
stats_progression.median_note: Repertoire median latency: {median} ms · gate ≤ {threshold} ms ({k}×).
stats_progression.median_cold: Latency isn't judged yet — too few samples (the gate appears with data).
stats_progression.rhythm_note: Rhythm and the thermostat (flow zone) don't affect progression yet — designed, not wired.
stats_progression.guest: Sign in to see step progression

repertoire_progress.title: Step progress
repertoire_progress.guest_invite: Sign in to save step progress

train_gate.guest: Training requires signing in — your profile and progress live on the server.

keyboard_required.title: A physical keyboard is required
keyboard_required.body: FlowTyping is a touch-typing trainer built for the desktop. Typing needs a physical keyboard — open it on a computer.

sign_in.title: Sign in to FlowTyping
sign_in.disclaimer: Your progress is tied to your sign-in method — use the same one each time.
